subject: Use RC1 version of parent poms
commit_message:
Use RC1 version of parent poms

Update to use RC1 version of parent poms

Change-Id: If4dc484043838f5d075580b7a0b4e196d2d89a80
Issue-ID: CCSDK-2344
Signed-off-by: Dan Timoney <dtimoney@att.com>

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/ccsdk-sli-plugins-maven-verify-frankfurt-mvn35-openjdk8/4/ : FAILURE

Unable to build due to a non-resolvable parent POM. Search logs for "[FATAL] Non-resolvable parent POM" to find the logs.

The fix for this is usually to make sure your poms are pointing to parents that exist. Double check:

 * groupId is correct and no typos
 * artifactId is correct and no typos
 * version is correct for branch ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/ccsdk-sli-plugins-maven-verify-frankfurt-mvn35-openjdk8/4/ )
